# ReferralVerse

> Find the best referral offers, coupons, and promo codes curated for travel, finance, food, and lifestyle in India.

ReferralVerse is a curated platform that helps users discover and share verified referral codes, signup bonuses, and promotional offers across popular Indian apps and services. Each listing includes step-by-step signup instructions, current bonus amounts, terms and conditions, comparison tables, and FAQs.

## Site Structure

- **Homepage** (`/`): Browse all referral offers with category filtering and search.
- **Post Pages** (`/{slug}`): Detailed referral offer pages with referral code, signup steps, benefits, T&C, proof screenshots, and FAQs.
- **Category Pages** (`/category/{slug}`): Browse offers filtered by category (e.g., Credit Cards, Water Purifiers, Fitness).
- **Referral Aggregator** (`/referral-aggregator`): A consolidated view of the latest referral codes.

## Categories Covered

- Credit Cards (Tata Neu, SuperMoney, Kiwi, etc.)
- Water Purifiers (DrinkPrime, Livpure Smart)
- Fitness (CultFit)
- And more categories being added regularly.

## Content Types

Each referral offer page typically includes:
- Verified referral code and/or referral link
- Signup bonus and referral bonus amounts
- Step-by-step claim instructions
- Key benefits of the product/service
- Comparison tables with competitors
- Terms and conditions
- Frequently Asked Questions (with structured data)
- Proof of reward screenshots

## Contact

- Website: https://referralverse.in
- Sitemap: https://referralverse.in/sitemap.xml
